title: SHACOS Set of 6 Round Placemats, 38 cm Washable Cotton Placemat and 6 Pcs Coasters 10 cm, Decorative Heat Resistant Placemat for Kitchen Dining Table
features: Material: Braided with polypropylene and cotton blend yarns. Wrinkle resistant.
Packaging: Set of 6 placemats with 38 cm diameter with 6 coasters with 10 cm diameter.
Easy to clean: wipe clean with a damp cloth. Hand wash in cold soapy water and air dry. Not easy to fade.
Decoration: Made with special technology, elegant style, it can be used as decoration for your dining table, tea table, exhibition stand.
Use SHACOS round placemats for birthdays, Christmas, housewarming, holidays, parties, family gatherings, weddings, etc.
description: Product Description SHACOS Set of 6 Round Placemats and Coasters Washable Woven Round Placemat Heat Resistant Placemats Round Placemats for Kitchen Table - Beige Material: Polypropylene material, durable and environmental, not faded, heat resistant Package: 6pcs round placemats and 6pcs coasters Coasters size: about 10 x 10 cm, placemats: 38 x 38 cm, large enough for any plate or bowl. Reusable, stain resistant, wrinkle resistant, long service life. No fading. Usage: Can be used for any occasion, indoors and outdoors. Ideal for wedding, barbecue, terrace, party, holiday, thanksgiving day and Christmas, etc. Stylish and functional Protect your tabletop from scratches and stains from food or drinking glasses. You can use it on all types of tables. Kitchen Placemat A perfect gift for your friends and family for housewarming, wedding, birthday, Christmas / holiday etc. Perfect decoration These round placemats create a warm atmosphere for your family. Suitable for all occasions, indoors or outdoors, holiday and daily wear are great. EASY TO CLEAN: For daily maintenance wipe with a wet sponge or cloth, will not fade and shrink, can be used repeatedly.Use a soft brush with soapy water to gently clean stubborn stains.Do not wash with washing machine or dishwasher.Do not use microwave. Placemats for Round Table Placemats for Kitchen Placemats for Restaurant NOT FULLY WATERPROOF: Please note that the liquid can get into the table through the mat as it is a woven fabric mat.Regarding the creases: round placemat will be folded and delivered, don't worry about the creases, Please lay out the placemats in the opposite direction and put some heavy objects on it for a period of time, and the creases will disappear.
